title: DECO EXPRESS Candles Set Classic Dripless Tapered Metallic Unscented 8H Burning Time, Decorative Dinner Candles for Restaurant Home Christmas (Red, 15 Pack)
features: Elevate your ambiance with our range of tapered candle multipacks. Each candle boasts an impressive 8-hour burn time, and they come in a range of metallic or rustic colours to choose from
Long Burning - Each set includes 6, 10, 15, or 50 candles, each providing an impressive 8-hour burn time. You’ll be plenty stocked for candlelit dinners or cosy evenings in
Available in a wide range of colours, these long candles are a versatile choice for enhancing any setting, be it a romantic dinner, a festive event, or everyday home decor
Crafted with precision, these candles are designed to fit most candle holders and offer a clean and even burn, non drip, ensuring a consistently beautiful and lasting glow
Multipack of tapered unscented candles. See product images for available designs, colours, size and further information
description: Product Description Tapered Dinner Candles Whether you're looking to create a cosy atmosphere or set the stage for a special occasion, our taper candles add a touch of elegance and warmth to your space, perfect as Christmas candles or dinner candles for every occasion. The Perfect Candles to Brighten Up Your Interior Deco Express long-lasting candles are fragrance-free, non-drip and last up to 8 hours to give you a simple and elegant solution to brighten up your home. Taper Candles in Sets of 10, 15 or 50 With a wide choice of colours and styles on offer, you can be sure to find the perfect set of long-lasting candles to complete your home decor.
